meaning: vt.鍒嗗彂,鍒嗛厤,鏁ｅ竷,鍒嗗竷,鍒嗙被,鍒嗗尯v.鍒嗗彂
examples: Aid workers helped distribute corn, milk and other staples.
UN peacekeepers are trying to distribute supplies to 30,000 civilians.
He sometimes employs sales-girls to distribute samples of his product.
The centres would distribute the food and also welcome people in for a chat.
They (or their staffers) use the service to distribute press releases and friendly editorials.
